title: Playbook de operador
commands: python -m devpilot_core schema validate --schema-id PostHManifest --instance docs/post_h_024_a_manifest.json --json
pass_criteria: POST-H-024 backlog and implementation document are approved.
Operator onboarding playbook exists, is approved and contains idea → workspace → docs → readiness → backlog.
Playbook contains local-first, dry-run, no-remote, no-external-api, no-connector-write and no-plugin-execution rules.
Playbook uses commands that exist in the current repo and marks future automation as pending.
TCR v1/v2 and documentation governance register POST-H-024-A artifacts.
block_criteria: Playbook suggests non-existing commands as current without marking them future.
Any red/external API/remote execution/connector write/plugin execution capability is enabled.
Templates or bootstrap workflow are partially implemented in POST-H-024-A instead of reserved for B/C.
risks: POST-H-024-A is playbook-only and must not be interpreted as full project bootstrap automation.
Templates and workflow validation remain pending until POST-H-024-B/C/D/E.
Future execute mode must refuse overwrite by default and stay workspace-bounded.
notes: POST-H-024-A converts onboarding guidance into an approved operator playbook.
No new dependency or external service is introduced.
